config_template.fast_and_approximate_mode: {FAST_APPROX:bool, default=False; observed True for small gate tensors and accuracy-tolerant paths (~77% faster: 1789ns vs 7886ns per tile)}

applicability_notes: Element-wise unary; golden is torch.tanh. Frequently appears in fused contexts: (1) gated residual: ttnn.mul(branch_out, ttnn.tanh(gate)) ~ torch: branch_out * torch.tanh(gate); (2) logit softcapping: ttnn.mul(ttnn.tanh(ttnn.mul(logits, 1.0/cap)), cap) ~ torch: torch.tanh(logits / cap) * cap; (3) gelu-tanh approximation building block. Works element-wise on TP-sharded vocab dims without gather.

placement_observations.source: test: ttnn.from_torch(..., memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); output_tensor = ttnn.tanh(input_tensor_a, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small per-layer gate tensor (e.g., gate_attn/gate_ffn, shape ~[1] or [1,1,1,D])
placement_observations.source: model call site: attn_out = ttnn.mul(attn_out, ttnn.tanh(self.gate_attn, fast_and_approximate_mode=True)) following ttnn.to_memory_config(attn_out, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) (DRAM workaround for circular buffer error)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: vocoder post-conv activations [B, T_post, 1] on TILE
placement_observations.source: model call site: h = ttnn.tanh(x_post, memory_config=mc_dram)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: large audio waveform tensor (final decoder output, range [-1,1])
placement_observations.source: model call site: audio_tt = ttnn.tanh(hidden_states_tt, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: TP-sharded logits [B, 1, S, vocab/tp] in softcapping path
placement_observations.source: model call site: logits = ttnn.tanh(logits) within softcap sequence; element-wise op applied before all-gather of sharded vocab dim
